metadata.description: Riverty AI Package Hub — curated skills and AI capabilities for the Riverty platform

plugins.name: rty-atlassian-mcp

plugins.name: rty-skill-authoring
plugins.description: Create, review, and refine agent skills following Riverty conventions and the agentskills.io specification

plugins.name: rty-web-accessibility

plugins.name: rty-terraform-azure-cdn-classic-migration
plugins.description: Guide Azure CDN Classic to Azure Front Door migration for Terraform-managed environments

plugins.name: rty-test-plugin
plugins.description: Reference plugin demonstrating all supported plugin primitives (skills, hooks, MCP, rules)

plugins.name: bip-python-skill
plugins.description: Python coding practices for maintainable, secure, and scalable code following BIP standards

plugins.name: bip-terraform-skill
